de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.conditions

Class TypeComparisonCondition

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.VariableConditionAdapter
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.conditions.TypeComparisonCondition
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    VariableCondition

    public final class TypeComparisonCondition
extends VariableConditionAdapter
    General varcond for checking relationships between types of schema variables.

      TypeComparisonCondition(TypeResolver fst, TypeResolver snd, TypeComparisonCondition.Mode mode)
      creates a condition that checks if the declaration types of the schemavariable's instantiations are unequal

    • Constructor Detail

      • TypeComparisonCondition

        public TypeComparisonCondition(TypeResolver fst,
                       TypeResolver snd,
                       TypeComparisonCondition.Mode mode)
        creates a condition that checks if the declaration types of the schemavariable's instantiations are unequal
        Parameters:
        fst - one of the SchemaVariable whose type is checked
        snd - one of the SchemaVariable whose type is checked
        mode - an int encoding if testing of not same or not compatible

      • check

        public boolean check(SchemaVariable var,
            SVSubstitute subst,
            SVInstantiations svInst,
            Services services)
        Description copied from class: VariableConditionAdapter
        checks if the condition for a correct instantiation is fulfilled
        Specified by:
        check in class VariableConditionAdapter
        Parameters:
        var - the template Variable to be instantiated
        svInst - the MatchCondition with the current matching state and in particular the SVInstantiations that are already known to be needed
        services - the program information object
        Returns:
        true iff condition is fulfilled
